FAQs
[/et_pb_text][dipl_separator seprator_thickness="2px" separator_color="#00457A" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" max_width="14%" custom_margin="||20px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][/dipl_separator][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" header_font_size="60px" custom_margin="||20px||false|false" header_font_size_tablet="50px" header_font_size_phone="32px" header_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Frequently Asked Questions

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/dpbc-hero-business.webp" title_text="dpbc-hero-business" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Your content goes here. Edit or remove this text inline or in the module Content settings. You can also style every aspect of this content in the module Design settings and even apply custom CSS to this text in the module Advanced settings.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion open_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" open_toggle_background_color="#00457a" closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#00457a" icon_color="#FFFFFF" use_icon_font_size="on" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" toggle_font="||||||||" toggle_font_size="18px" body_font="||||||||" body_text_color="#FFFFFF" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="Q: How often will coaching sessions occur?" open="on" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Coaching sessions frequency can vary based on your needs and availability. Typically, sessions are scheduled weekly or bi-weekly for consistent progress.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Q: What if I need to reschedule a session?" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

We understand life happens. Just let us know at least 24 hours in advance, and we'll work together to find a new suitable time for your session.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Q: How long does a coaching program typically last?" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Coaching program durations vary based on your goals and progress. Typically, programs range from 3 to 6 months, but we tailor the length to suit your specific needs.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Q: What qualifications and experience do your coaches have?" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Our coaches are highly qualified professionals with extensive experience in business and coaching. They hold relevant certifications and have a proven track record of helping clients succeed.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Q: How do you ensure confidentiality during coaching sessions?" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Confidentiality is paramount in our coaching practice. We adhere to strict confidentiality policies, ensuring that all discussions and information shared during sessions remain private and secure.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Q: What types of businesses do you work with?" _builder_version="4.25.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

We work with a diverse range of businesses, including startups, small businesses, and established enterprises across various industries. Our coaching approach is adaptable to suit the unique needs of each client.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
